channel.title: mcp4725 on SoundsBrown
channel.description: Recent content in mcp4725 on SoundsBrown

item.title: LFO
item.description: Arduino-based digital LFO. Rate from 0.01 Hz to 37 Hz using a non-linear scale. Six waveforms: saw, ramp, triangle, square, sine and value noise (Perlin-esque). PWM control for all waveforms. Unipolar output (0V - 5V) through an MCP4725 DAC (I2C interface, 12 bit resolution). Optional status display on an I2C OLED. Output is buffered using a TL08x References: https://www.sparkfun.com/products/12918 https://github.com/olikraus/U8g2_Arduino
